## Evidence

Add screenshots, console output, failing test output, or corrected primary sources. Remove secrets and personal information.

## Accessibility impact

Describe any keyboard, screen-reader, contrast, motion, touch, or responsive impact.

## Scope guard

List unrelated code or content that should not change while fixing this bug.

## Completion criteria

- [ ] Root cause is identified.
- [ ] The focused fix is implemented.
- [ ] A regression check or test is added when practical.
- [ ] Lint, type-check, and build pass.
- [ ] Relevant browser, mobile, and accessibility behavior is verified.
- [ ] Project state and changelog are updated when applicable.
